Grades Calculator (Weighted)

Use this page as a fun, optional morale booster in Brightspace.

How to use in Brightspace

  1. Go to Content in your course
  2. Select Create New → HTML Document
  3. Open Source (</>)
  4. Copy the HTML below and paste it

Preview

Grade Calculator

Enter estimated grades (0–100). Blank fields are ignored.

Syllabus Weights (%)

Tip: Weights can sum to 100%. If some categories are blank, the calculator can normalize them automatically.

Your Estimated Grades (0–100)

Results

Enter grades and click Calculate.

Note: This is an estimate tool for planning. Always follow your instructor’s official gradebook and syllabus rules.

Copy HTML

Copy everything below:


<section aria-label="Grade Calculator" style="max-width:820px;margin:0 auto;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#313131;line-height:1.45;">
  <div style="border:1px solid #e6e6e6;border-radius:16px;padding:16px;background:#fff;">
    <header style="border-left:8px solid #cb4900;background:#fff7f0;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:12px;">
      <h2 style="margin:0 0 4px 0;color:#cb4900;font-size:1.15rem;">Grade Calculator</h2>
      <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.95rem;">
        Enter estimated grades (0–100). Blank fields are ignored.
      </p>
    </header>

    <!-- Weights -->
    <section style="margin-top:14px;">
      <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px 0;font-size:1.05rem;">Syllabus Weights (%)</h3>

      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(210px,1fr));gap:10px;">
        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:700;">Assignments</span>
          <input id="wAssignments" type="number" min="0" max="100" value="20" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>

        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:700;">Quizzes</span>
          <input id="wQuizzes" type="number" min="0" max="100" value="15" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>

        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:700;">Exams</span>
          <input id="wExams" type="number" min="0" max="100" value="25" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>

        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:700;">Midterm(s)</span>
          <input id="wMidterm" type="number" min="0" max="100" value="15" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>

        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:700;">Final</span>
          <input id="wFinal" type="number" min="0" max="100" value="15" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>

        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:700;">Projects</span>
          <input id="wProjects" type="number" min="0" max="100" value="10" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>
      </div>

      <p id="weightNote" style="margin:10px 0 0 0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.9rem;">
        Tip: Weights can sum to 100%. If some categories are blank, the calculator can normalize them automatically.
      </p>
    </section>

    <!-- Grades -->
    <section style="margin-top:16px;">
      <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px 0;font-size:1.05rem;">Your Estimated Grades (0–100)</h3>

      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(210px,1fr));gap:10px;">
        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:700;">Assignments</span>
          <input id="gAssignments" type="number" min="0" max="100" placeholder="e.g., 92" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>

        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:700;">Quizzes</span>
          <input id="gQuizzes" type="number" min="0" max="100" placeholder="e.g., 85" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>

        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:700;">Exams</span>
          <input id="gExams" type="number" min="0" max="100" placeholder="e.g., 78" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>

        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:700;">Midterm(s)</span>
          <input id="gMidterm" type="number" min="0" max="100" placeholder="e.g., 88" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>

        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:700;">Final</span>
          <input id="gFinal" type="number" min="0" max="100" placeholder="e.g., 90" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>

        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:700;">Projects</span>
          <input id="gProjects" type="number" min="0" max="100" placeholder="e.g., 95" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>
      </div>

      <div style="margin-top:12px;display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <button id="calcBtn" type="button" style="cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #cb4900;background:#cb4900;color:#fff; padding:10px 14px;border-radius:12px;font-weight:800;">
          Calculate
        </button>

        <button id="resetBtn" type="button" style="cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #cb4900;background:#fff;color:#cb4900; padding:10px 14px;border-radius:12px;font-weight:800;">
          Reset
        </button>

        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.95rem;">
          <input id="normalizeToggle" type="checkbox" checked>
          Normalize weights when some grades are blank
        </label>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Results -->
    <section style="margin-top:16px;">
      <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px 0;font-size:1.05rem;">Results</h3>

      <div id="resultBox" style="border:1px solid #e6e6e6;border-radius:14px;padding:12px;background:#fff;">
        <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;">
          Enter grades and click <strong>Calculate</strong>.
        </p>
      </div>

      <div id="breakdownBox" style="margin-top:10px;"></div>

      <p style="margin-top:10px;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.85rem;">
        Note: This is an estimate tool for planning. Always follow your instructor’s official gradebook and syllabus rules.
      </p>
    </section>
  </div>

  <script>
    (function () {
      const ids = {
        weights: {
          assignments: "wAssignments",
          quizzes: "wQuizzes",
          exams: "wExams",
          midterm: "wMidterm",
          final: "wFinal",
          projects: "wProjects"
        },
        grades: {
          assignments: "gAssignments",
          quizzes: "gQuizzes",
          exams: "gExams",
          midterm: "gMidterm",
          final: "gFinal",
          projects: "gProjects"
        }
      };

      const calcBtn = document.getElementById("calcBtn");
      const resetBtn = document.getElementById("resetBtn");
      const normalizeToggle = document.getElementById("normalizeToggle");
      const resultBox = document.getElementById("resultBox");
      const breakdownBox = document.getElementById("breakdownBox");

      function numOrNull(v) {
        if (v === "" || v === null || v === undefined) return null;
        const n = Number(v);
        return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : null;
      }

      function clamp(n, min, max) {
        return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, n));
      }

      function getValues(map) {
        const out = {};
        for (const [k, id] of Object.entries(map)) {
          out[k] = numOrNull(document.getElementById(id).value);
        }
        return out;
      }

      function sum(obj) {
        return Object.values(obj).reduce((a, b) => a + (b ?? 0), 0);
      }

      function fmt(n) {
        return (Math.round(n * 100) / 100).toFixed(2);
      }

      function calculate() {
        const weights = getValues(ids.weights);
        const grades = getValues(ids.grades);

        for (const k of Object.keys(weights)) {
          if (weights[k] !== null) weights[k] = clamp(weights[k], 0, 100);
        }
        for (const k of Object.keys(grades)) {
          if (grades[k] !== null) grades[k] = clamp(grades[k], 0, 100);
        }

        const included = {};
        for (const k of Object.keys(grades)) {
          if (grades[k] !== null) included[k] = true;
        }

        const includedKeys = Object.keys(included);
        if (includedKeys.length === 0) {
          resultBox.innerHTML = '<p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;">Please enter at least one grade to calculate.</p>';
          breakdownBox.innerHTML = "";
          return;
        }

        const effWeights = {};
        includedKeys.forEach(k => effWeights[k] = weights[k] ?? 0);

        const weightSum = sum(effWeights);

        let denom = 100;
        let usingNormalized = false;

        if (normalizeToggle.checked) {
          denom = weightSum;
          usingNormalized = true;
        }

        if (denom <= 0) {
          resultBox.innerHTML = '<p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;">Weights for entered categories sum to 0. Set at least one weight above 0.</p>';
          breakdownBox.innerHTML = "";
          return;
        }

        let total = 0;
        const rows = [];

        includedKeys.forEach(k => {
          const w = effWeights[k];
          const g = grades[k];
          const contrib = (g * (w / denom));
          total += contrib;

          rows.push({
            name: k,
            grade: g,
            weight: w,
            normalizedWeight: (w / denom) * 100,
            contribution: contrib
          });
        });

        const label = {
          assignments: "Assignments",
          quizzes: "Quizzes",
          exams: "Exams",
          midterm: "Midterm(s)",
          final: "Final",
          projects: "Projects"
        };

        const headline = `
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:baseline;">
            <p style="margin:0;font-weight:900;font-size:1.2rem;color:#313131;">
              Estimated Current Grade: <span style="color:#cb4900;">${fmt(total)}%</span>
            </p>
            <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.9rem;">
              Included categories: ${includedKeys.length} ${usingNormalized ? "(normalized)" : ""}
            </p>
          </div>
        `;

        resultBox.innerHTML = headline;

        const tableRows = rows.map(r => `
          <tr>
            <td style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><strong>${label[r.name]}</strong></td>
            <td style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">${fmt(r.grade)}%</td>
            <td style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">${fmt(r.weight)}%</td>
            <td style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">${fmt(r.normalizedWeight)}%</td>
            <td style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">${fmt(r.contribution)}%</td>
          </tr>
        `).join("");

        breakdownBox.innerHTML = `
          <div style="border:1px solid #e6e6e6;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;">
            <div style="padding:10px 12px;background:#f7f7f7;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.95rem;">
              Weighted Breakdown
            </div>
            <div style="overflow:auto;">
              <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;min-width:620px;">
                <thead>
                  <tr style="text-align:left;background:#fff;">
                    <th style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">Category</th>
                    <th style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">Grade</th>
                    <th style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">Weight</th>
                    <th style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">Used Weight</th>
                    <th style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">Contribution</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>${tableRows}</tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
      }

      function resetAll() {
        Object.values(ids.grades).forEach(id => document.getElementById(id).value = "");
        resultBox.innerHTML = '<p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;">Enter grades and click <strong>Calculate</strong>.</p>';
        breakdownBox.innerHTML = "";
      }

      calcBtn.addEventListener("click", calculate);
      resetBtn.addEventListener("click", resetAll);
    })();
  </script>
</section>

← Back to catalog
